# Wafa Educational And Charitable Trust

> Wafa Educational And Charitable Trust is a registered Indian charity based in Akola, Maharashtra (wafatrustindia.org). It works directly on the ground to help the poor and needy across India through clean water, food, Islamic and higher education, mosque and madrasa construction, medical aid, and support for widows and families. Donations are eligible for tax deduction under Section 80G (Registration/URN: AAATW5134DF20221). The trust accepts Zakat, Sadaqah and Lillah and distributes Zakat only to eligible recipients.

The site lets donors learn about the trust's programmes, read guides on Islamic giving (Zakat, Sadaqah Jariyah, Lillah), and donate securely online via Razorpay. Content is written for both Indian donors and the Indian diaspora.

Note: The trust is not FCRA-registered, so it does not solicit foreign-source contributions; donors abroad should confirm the applicable method with the trust before giving.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://wafatrustindia.org/): Overview of the trust, impact counters, and featured programmes.
- [About Us](https://wafatrustindia.org/about): The trust's mission, history and approach in Akola, Maharashtra.
- [Our Mission](https://wafatrustindia.org/mission): The trust's goals and guiding principles.
- [Our Vision](https://wafatrustindia.org/vision): The long-term vision for uplifting communities.
- [Donate Now](https://wafatrustindia.org/donate): Secure online donation (Razorpay), bank/UPI details, and 80G tax-exemption information.
- [Contact](https://wafatrustindia.org/contact): Phone, email, WhatsApp and address (Near Zubaida Hospital, Mohammadi Chowk, Akola, Maharashtra 444001, India).
- [Photo Gallery](https://wafatrustindia.org/gallery): Images of the trust's charity work.
- [Blog](https://wafatrustindia.org/blog): 50+ guides on Zakat, Sadaqah, impact stories and donor resources.

## Programmes (Services)

- [Water Well for Needy Place](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/water-well-for-needy-place): Borewells and wells for water-scarce communities.
- [Handpump for Needy Place](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/handpump-for-needy-place): Hand pumps installed near settlements.
- [Water Supply Through Tankers](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/supply-of-water-to-the-needy-through-tankers): Emergency tanker water where sources have failed.
- [Masjid / Madrasa Build](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/masjid-madrasa-build): Building mosques, madrasas and schools.
- [Wazu Khana Build](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/wazu-khana-build): Ablution facilities for mosques.
- [Quran e Kareem Distribution](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/quran-e-kareem-distribution-2): Distributing copies of the Holy Qur'an.
- [Maktab Deeniyat](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/maktab-deeniyat): Online and offline Islamic education for children.
- [Ustad & Hafiz Sponsor](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/ustad-hafiz-sponsor): Sponsoring teachers of the Qur'an.
- [Scholarship for Higher Education](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/scholarship-for-higher-education): Funding deserving students.
- [Free Food Distribution](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/free-food-distribution): Meals for the hungry.
- [Free Distribution of Ration Kit](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/free-distribution-of-ration-kit): A month of staple food for a family.
- [Iftar For Ramadan](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/iftar-for-ramadan): Iftar meals for fasting families.
- [Blankets Winter Distribution](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/blankets-winter-distribution): Warmth for the poor in winter.
- [Widows Help](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/widows-help): Support and empowerment for widows.
- [Poor Family Help](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/poor-family-help): Assistance for struggling families.
- [Poor Girl Marriage Help](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/poor-girl-marriage-help): Dignified marriage assistance.
- [House Build](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/house-build): Homes for poor and homeless families.
- [Medical Aid](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/medical-aid): Treatment and medical-bill support.
- [Wheelchair Distribution](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/wheelchair-distribution): Mobility aids for the disabled.
- [Tricycle Distribution](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/tricycle-distribution): Hand-powered tricycles for mobility.
- [Sewing Machine Distribution](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/sewing-machine-distribution): Empowering women with a livelihood.
- [Small Business Project](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/small-business-project): Financial aid for small enterprises.
- [Cash Gift](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/cash-gift): Direct cash assistance for the needy.
- [Distribution of Benches and Mats](https://wafatrustindia.org/services/distribution-of-benches-and-mats): Seating for madrasas and schools.

## Featured Guides (Blog)

- [Zakat Calculator 2026: How Much Should You Pay?](https://wafatrustindia.org/blog/zakat-calculator-2026-how-much-should-you-pay): How to calculate Zakat (nisab, 2.5% rule, examples).
- [Sadaqah Jariyah: Meaning & Best Examples](https://wafatrustindia.org/blog/sadaqah-jariyah-meaning-and-best-examples-2026): Ongoing charity that keeps rewarding.
- [Zakat vs Sadaqah vs Lillah: Complete Guide](https://wafatrustindia.org/blog/zakat-vs-sadaqah-vs-lillah-complete-guide): The difference and when to use each.
- [Who Can Receive Zakat? 8 Categories](https://wafatrustindia.org/blog/who-can-receive-zakat-8-eligible-categories): Zakat eligibility explained.
- [80G Tax Benefits for Donations in India](https://wafatrustindia.org/blog/80g-tax-benefits-for-donations-in-india-2026): How the 80G deduction works.
- [How to Choose a Trustworthy Zakat Charity](https://wafatrustindia.org/blog/how-to-choose-a-trustworthy-zakat-charity-in-india): A 7-point checklist for donors.
- [Why Donors Choose Wafa Trust](https://wafatrustindia.org/blog/why-donors-choose-wafa-educational-and-charitable-trust): The direct, local, transparent model.
